title: SEARCH 6 — Joe sniffs out the helmet inside the package
prompt: Close-up shot in @bedroom-sisters. @Joe (small fluffy white-tan Pomeranian) is in the CENTER FOREGROUND, his head buried inside the chewed-open brown package on the lower bunk bed. He pulls out a colorful nylon strap with his teeth. @Sara on the LEFT and @Eva on the RIGHT crouch down to look. Joe: "Yip yip!" Eva (curious): "What is it, Joe?" Sara (peering in): "Looks like… a strap?" Eva (eyes wide): "It's something for HEADS!" Warm bedroom light.
